terms.Enneahcube: The 9-dimensional binary hypercube over F₂⁹, used as local state alphabet.
terms.Finite local layer: The local integrity and admissibility structure; finite and exactly testable.
terms.Leaf branch: A frontier branch representing a possible ASH history/worldline at a given depth/time.
terms.Branch tree: The unbounded family of admissible ASH histories rooted at an initial condition.
terms.Commitment: Observer-relative record selection; in many-worlds ASH, does not delete other branches.
terms.Branch measure μ: A nonnegative normalized measure over leaves, if using probabilistic branches.
terms.Branch amplitude ψ: A complex amplitude over leaves, if using a quantum/Everett-like model.
terms.Decoherence functional: A rule measuring effective noninterference/separation between branches.
terms.Bridge map ℬ_ℓ: A scale-dependent map from branch ensemble to effective spacetime/fields/observables.
